title: Quiz Question
description: A multiple choice question within a quiz assessment. Questions are defined inline in chapter.yml files within multipleChoiceAssessments arrays.

index.description: Sequential index within the questions array (0-based). Auto-generated by tpm build if not provided.

code.description: Unique identifier for this question. Can be UUID format or semantic string. Used for tracking learner progress and question analytics.

question.description: The question text presented to the learner.

type.description: Question type: SINGLE (one correct answer) or MULTIPLE (multiple correct answers allowed).

options.description: Array of possible answer choices. Must have at least 2 options.
